dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.line: "This case is going cold, Zephyra. I need something, anything to crack it."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAELIN, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ZEPHYRA
dialogue.line: "I've been going over the security footage, Kaelin. I think I found something."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Kaelin, eyes scanning the room with a mix of frustration and desperation.

dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Zephyra, eyes locked on the holographic display, a hint of a smile playing on her lips.

dialogue.speaker: ZEPHYRA
dialogue.line: "A figure, tall and slender, entered the building the night of the murder. They wore a black cloak and a mask."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Kaelin, leaning in, intense interest in his eyes.

dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.line: "That's our guy. Let's get to work, Zephyra. We need to track down this...figure."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of Zephyra, her hands gesturing animatedly as she speaks.

dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.line: "This is a dead end, Zephyra. We've been canvassing the entire city, and no one's seen anything."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAELIN, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ZEPHYRA
dialogue.line: "That's not true, Kaelin. I've been talking to some of the locals, and they've heard rumors of a hidden underground club. Maybe our guy is hiding there."
dialogue.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of Kaelin, Zephyra standing beside him, a look of concern on her face.

dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.line: "I don't know, Zephyra. That sounds like a wild goose chase."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Zephyra, eyes sparkling with excitement.

dialogue.speaker: ZEPHYRA
dialogue.line: "It's worth a shot, Kaelin. We have nothing else to lose."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Kaelin, a hint of skepticism in his eyes.

dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.line: "Stay close, Zephyra. We don't know what we're walking into."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of KAELIN, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ZEPHYRA
dialogue.line: "I've got a bad feeling about this, Kaelin. We should go back."
dialogue.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of Kaelin, Zephyra right behind him, her eyes darting back and forth.

dialogue.speaker: KAELIN
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of Zephyra, her voice barely above a whisper, fear creeping into her eyes.
